5.name: Fleetness
5.description: ness : The vampire can add their Celerity to non-combat Dexterity checks.

6.name: [1] Flawless Parry
6.description: Make perfect defensive motions at the expense of taking no other action Momentum : Focus your Celerity into one instant, increasing your strength Precision : Enter a trance where you can operate with exceptionally fine manipulation Projectile : Throw objects with the speed of your Celerity Tireless Tread : Run at 50 miles per hour for at least eight hours Quickness : Expend a blood and gain yet another additional turn. All previous celerity levels are activated

7.name: [2] Celerity Refinement
7.description: Choose to spend vitae for Celerity as you need them, rather than declaring them beforehand Flower of Death : Use your Celerity to gain bonuses to attacking Quickness : Expend extra blood points to gain extra actions, at the cost of an unsoakable lethal damage level per action Stutter-Step : Use your Celerity to gain bonuses to defense

8.name: [3] Physical Defiance
8.description: Move so fast you defy gravity and kill mortals instantly as you pass through them The Unseen Storm : Move so fast you are truly invisible Time out of Time : React instantly to anything and move before anyone realizes what you have done Zephyr : Move so fast that you seem to defy gravity

9.name: [4] Paragon of Motion
9.description: Perform most physical acts without fail Between the Ticks : Expend a blood and a Willpower , you gain an automatic success on all attacks delivered to an opponent with less than advanced Celerity. You have an extra action against those with advanced Celerity. All attacks delivered by those with less than advanced Celerity are considered to be automatic failures. You can declare fair escape at any time
